TITLE Tofu Steak with Mashed Sweet Potato

{[Tofu]
# Press [15 oz extra firm tofu] and slice into 8 slabs.

# In a shallow dish that will hold the tofu combine:{
[2 tbl tamari]
[2 tbl maple syrup]
[2 tbl mirin]
[1 tbl toasted sesame oil]
[1 tbl barbecue sauce]
[1 tbl sriracha]
[1 cloves garlic[, crushed]]
[1 tsp garlic powder]
[1/2 tsp liquid smoke]
[1/2 tsp salt]
[1/4 tsp pepper]
}

# Place tofu slices in the dish and toss to coat. Marinate for at least 15 minutes. 
# Pan fry tofu. 
}

{[Sweet Potato Mash]
# Peel and cube [2 lbs sweet potatoes].
# Gently boil sweet potatoes until very tender.
# Drain and add: [1 tsp salt], [1/4 cup milk], [3 tbl butter]. 
# Mash and stir to combine. 
# Season with [salt] and [pepper].
}

# Serve tofu over a bed of sweet potato mash. Brush tofu with extra marinade if desired.
